subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The fame of the Ancient Beauty's advent hath encompassed the East of the world and the West of the firmament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خداوند صیت ظهور جمال قدم شرق جهان و غرب کیهان را احاطه نموده است و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
